title: agropyron tenerum var. novae-angliae
intro: Agropyron tenerum var. novae-angliae, also known as the New England slender wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheatgrass family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of New England slender wheatgrass include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. New England slender wheatgrass can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and powders, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
